data.title: Kanye West, Elon Musk Or Joe Rogan? Here's Who's Next In Line To Launch A Crypto Coin, According To Kalshi Traders
data.description: Infamous rapper Ye, formerly known as Kanye West, is the most likely celebrity to next launch a meme coin, according to prediction market platform Kalshi.

data.title: PDD Holdings Shares Are Down Today: What's Going On?
data.description: PDD Holdings (NASDAQ: PDD) shares are trading lower Friday after the company reported fourth-quarter earnings that missed revenue expectations.

data.title: Syndax's Revuforj Earns Strong Physician Support, JP Morgan Predicts Sales Growth
data.description: JP Morgan raised Syndax's price target to $41, citing strong early Revuforj sales and physician confidence in its use for acute leukemias and NPM1 AML.

data.title: Kratos Analyst Sees Growth Potential As Tactical Drones, Hypersonics Gain Traction
data.description: JP Morgan analyst raised KTOS price forecast to $33.00 from $27.00, citing progress in tactical drones, marine support, and hypersonic weapons.

data.title: FedEx Shares Are Down Today: What's Going On?
data.description: FedEx Inc. (NYSE: FDX) shares are trading lower Friday after the company reported third-quarter earnings that missed analysts' expectations on Thursday.
